title: athanasia spathulata
intro: Athanasia spathulata, also known as Cineraria maritima, is a flowering plant species in the daisy family that is commonly found along the coastlines of South Africa. The plant contains sesquiterpene lactones and other bioactive compounds, which have been found to have medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of inflammatory conditions such as arthritis and skin irritations. The health benefits of Athanasia spathulata include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. Herbal preparations of Athanasia spathulata are typically made by infusing the leaves and flowers in hot water, and are used to make teas, tinctures, and salves for topical application.
